name: Centrifugal Pump Assembly — 50 kW / 200 m³/h
description: Single-stage end-suction centrifugal pump. Q=200 m³/h, H=45 m, P=50 kW, N=1450 RPM. Class ISO 5199, back-pull-out. 316L impeller for chemical duty.

parts.name: Impeller — 316L Investment Cast
parts.tolerance: OD ±0.3 mm, balance G2.5 at 1450 RPM
parts.notes: Closed impeller. 5 backward-curved blades. Wear ring OD 185.00–185.03 mm.

parts.name: Pump Casing — Volute, Cast Iron
parts.surface_finish: Ra 6.3 μm flow passages, Ra 1.6 μm seal faces
parts.tolerance: Seal bore H7, impeller clearance 0.3–0.5 mm
parts.coating: Internal: Belzona 1111 epoxy 2 mm. External: 2-coat epoxy primer
parts.notes: Spiral volute with tangential discharge. Back-pull-out design. Pressure rating PN10.

parts.name: Pump Shaft — 316L Stainless
parts.surface_finish: Ra 0.4 μm bearing seats (ground), Ra 0.8 μm seal area

parts.name: Mechanical Seal — John Crane Type 1
parts.notes: Silicon carbide mating ring + rotary face. Double O-ring drive. API Plan 11 seal flush from discharge.

parts.name: Inboard Bearing — 6312-2RS
parts.tolerance: Housing: H7 (Ø130 H7), shaft: k5 (Ø60 k5)
parts.notes: Deep groove. FAG 6312-2RS1/C3. Grease: Esso Unirex N3. Re-lube interval 2000 h.

parts.name: Outboard Bearing — 6309-2RS
parts.notes: Angular contact optional for high thrust. Same grease as inboard.

parts.name: Bearing Housing — Cast Iron
parts.notes: Grease nipple both ends. Oil level sight glass. Cast iron EN-GJL-200.

parts.name: Flexible Coupling — Jaw Type
parts.notes: Jaw type elastomeric. 95 Shore A polyurethane spider. Transmits 500 N·m. ±1° misalignment.

parts.name: Baseplate — Welded Steel
parts.notes: Epoxy grouted to concrete plinth. Pump + motor common baseplate. 4 × M20 anchor bolts.

bom_notes: Omitted: motor, coupling guard, pressure gauges, isolation valves, drain port plugs.
